creator: n.diablo.n.f@list.ru
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #3)
The problem still exist after I compiled and installed latest version form ports:

# pkg info mesa-dri
mesa-dri-19.0.8_4
Name           : mesa-dri
Version        : 19.0.8_4
Installed on   : Wed Jun 10 15:43:28 2020 MSK

# pkg info mesa-libs
mesa-libs-19.0.8_1
Name           : mesa-libs
Version        : 19.0.8_1
Installed on   : Wed Jun 10 15:43:11 2020 MSK

I compiled with default options.
